text:
The paper is clearly real and the arXiv ID matches. The HKUST research portal also confirms the full author list: 
"Li, B., Zhang, Y., Guo, D., Zhang, R., Li, F., Zhang, H., Zhang, K., **Zhang, P.**, Li, Y., Liu, Z., & Li, C."
 — which includes "Zhang, P." (Peiyuan Zhang), confirming the cited author IS present in the actual author list (the automated checker's "actual" list appears to have omitted this author, likely pulling from a different version). The title, arXiv ID, and authors all match.

VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "LLaVA-OneVision: Easy Visual Task Transfer" exists at arXiv:2408.03326 with matching authors including Bo Li, Yuanhan Zhang, Dong Guo, Renrui Zhang, Feng Li, Hao Zhang, Kaichen Zhang, Peiyuan Zhang, Yanwei Li, Ziwei Liu, and Chunyuan Li — all substantially matching the cited reference. The automated checker appears to have incorrectly flagged Peiyuan Zhang as absent, but the HKUST research portal confirms her presence in the author list.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2408.03326
